overall.description: Cinematic aerial footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a foggy night in a neon-lit megacity. The camera drifts past a towering skyscraper marked with '12' before panning across the dense urban skyline filled with illuminated high-rises and busy highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of mega-building 12 and surrounding highways

agents.ego_description: aerial drone hovering steadily, focusing on the illuminated skyscraper and traffic patterns below

entered.detail: tall dark monolithic building with bright white illuminated number 12 near the top
multi-lane elevated freeway with streaming vehicle light trails
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings fading into the foggy distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stabilized aerial view focused on a massive skyscraper prominently displaying an illuminated '12'. Below, highways stream with traffic while the foggy night atmosphere diffuses the neon glow of the surrounding megacity. The camera maintains a steady hover, capturing the cyberpunk architecture and dense urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic aerial sweep across cyberpunk city center

events.description: camera begins smooth pan to the right, transitioning focus away from building 12
building 12 exits frame right, revealing deeper cityscape with red neon tower

agents.ego_description: drone camera sweeping horizontally across the skyline, revealing new districts and architectural details

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure with vertical red neon lighting and industrial platforms
complex multi-level highway junction with merging traffic streams
dense collection of high-rise buildings with varied neon signage and window lights

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right across the foggy cityscape, leaving the iconic '12' building behind and revealing a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. A distinctive red-lit tower dominates the new view while the camera continues its aerial sweep over highway interchanges and clusters of neon-illuminated skyscrapers fading into the atmospheric haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial sweep that transitions from a focused view of a single landmark skyscraper to a panoramic vista of a sprawling neon metropolis. It begins with a stabilized hover centered on a massive building prominently displaying an illuminated '12' above highways streaming with traffic. As the camera pans right, the iconic tower recedes, and the view expands to reveal the dense urban infrastructure of the megacity diffused by a foggy night atmosphere. The scene then shifts toward a distinctive red-lit tower that dominates the horizon while the camera continues its sweep over complex highway interchanges. Finally, the movement glides across clusters of neon-illuminated skyscrapers that gradually fade into the thick atmospheric haze.
